name: ENERGIZER HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Energizer is a global diversified household products leader in batteries, auto care and portable lights. It manufactures, markets and distributes household and specialty batteries; automotive appearance, performance, refrigerant and freshener products; and portable lights. Products are sold to consumers through many retail channels including mass merchandisers, warehouse clubs, food, drug, convenience stores, electronics specialty stores, department stores, hardware and automotive centers, e-commerce, military stores, and also via business-to-business sales to original equipment manufacturers and industrial, medical, office, and hearing aid distributors.
sellsTo: Business-to-business (original equipment manufacturers, industrial, medical, office, hearing aid distributors)

exposures.sentence: Energizer, through its operating subsidiaries, is a global diversified household products leader in batteries, auto care and portable lights.

Energizer offers household batteries including primary, rechargeable, specialty and hearing aid using many technologies including lithium, alkaline, carbon zinc, nickel metal hydride, zinc air, and silver oxide.

We distribute our products to consumers through numerous retail locations worldwide, including mass merchandisers and warehouse clubs, food, drug and convenience stores, electronics specialty stores and department stores, hardware and automotive centers, e-commerce and military stores.

catalysts.event: Transition of acquired branded battery business to legacy brands
catalysts.sentence: The Company will be working to transition from these branded business to legacy brands by December 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Project Momentum fourth year program completion
catalysts.sentence: Costs and savings are expected to be fully realized by September 30, 2026.
